caching: Redis for session storage and rate limiting
pattern: REST API with Next.js API routes

security.encryption: bcrypt for passwords, crypto for tokens

recommendations: Use NextAuth.js as alternative for simplified OAuth implementation
Use environment variables for all secrets
Set up automated token cleanup job
Implement audit logging for security events
Use database migrations for schema changes
Implement health check endpoints for monitoring
Set up rate limiting at nginx/CDN level
Use Redis Sentinel for high availability
Implement proper error handling and logging
Set up monitoring and alerting for failed login attempts
Use secure cookie settings (httpOnly, secure, sameSite)
Implement proper session invalidation on logout
Use parameterized queries to prevent SQL injection
Implement proper input validation and sanitization
